content.json:
# Sysmon — Process & Thread Hunting
**MITRE ATT&CK:** T1059 Command & Scripting Interpreter · T1055 Process Injection · T1003 OS Credential Dumping · T1543 Create/Modify System Process

**Data source:** `Event` table, `Source == 'Microsoft-Windows-Sysmon'` (collected by AMA via a DCR for `Microsoft-Windows-Sysmon/Operational`).

> For full process-tree parsing (ParentImage, hashes), deploy the community Sysmon parser function. These tiles use `RenderedDescription` so they work without it.

content.query: Event | where Source == 'Microsoft-Windows-Sysmon' | summarize Events=count() by EventID, bin(TimeGenerated,1h) | render timechart
content.title: Sysmon event volume by EventID

content.query: Event | where Source == 'Microsoft-Windows-Sysmon' and EventID == 1 | where RenderedDescription has_any ('-enc','-EncodedCommand','FromBase64String','Invoke-Expression','IEX ','DownloadString','-nop','-w hidden','bypass') | project TimeGenerated, Computer, RenderedDescription | take 200
content.title: Suspicious PowerShell / encoded command lines — T1059.001

content.query: Event | where Source == 'Microsoft-Windows-Sysmon' and EventID == 1 | where RenderedDescription has_any ('certutil','bitsadmin','mshta','regsvr32','rundll32','wmic ','cscript','wscript','installutil') | project TimeGenerated, Computer, RenderedDescription | take 200
content.title: LOLBin process creation — T1218

content.query: Event | where Source == 'Microsoft-Windows-Sysmon' and EventID == 3 | where RenderedDescription has_any ('lsass','mimikatz') or RenderedDescription has 'DestinationPort: 4444' | project TimeGenerated, Computer, RenderedDescription | take 200
content.title: Credential-access / suspicious network indicators — T1003
